results.rendered_html:
ucchūna a. [ud-śvi-kta]
1 Swollen; prabalaruditocchūnanetraṃ priyāyāḥ  Me. 84 ; uttānocchūnamaṃḍūkapāṭitodarasaṃnibhe  K. P. 7 ; anavarataruditocchūnatāmradṛṣṭiṃ  Dk. 95. 
2 Fat, bulky.
3 High, lofty.
